issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (activated by opponent's effect removing character), not 'OnKO'. OnKO fires when a character is KO'd; this effect triggers when opponent uses an effect to remove a character, which may not be KO.
Condition is 'Always' but should check 'HasCardOnBoard' with type 'Roger Pirates' to verify a qualifying character exists before triggering.
Action only adds DON but does not rest it. Must include a 'Rest' action after 'GiveDon' to match 'rest it' in card text.
Missing '[Once Per Turn]' limit enforcement in DSL structure.
